zh.Rougham, Mitford, Norfolk, England: 英國英格蘭諾福爾可盧加姆
zh.Ormsby, Caistor Saint Edmunds, Norfolk,: 英國英格蘭諾福爾可凱斯托 聖 艾德蒙茲
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Clere於1147年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可盧加姆時，他的父親John Clere27歲，母親Amy Amberfeld27歲。他於大約1167年與Julian Mollenes在英國諾福爾可盧加姆結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世在英國英格蘭諾福爾可凱斯托 聖 艾德蒙茲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Clere于1147年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可盧加姆时，他的父亲John Clere27岁，母亲Amy Amberfeld27岁。他于大约1167年与Julian Mollenes在英国諾福爾可盧加姆结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世在英国英格兰諾福爾可凱斯托 聖 艾德蒙茲。

nameMeanings.name: Clere
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Clear
meanings: English (southeastern England, of Norman origin): from Clere, the French popular form of the personal name Clare 2, and possibly interchangeable with it or confused with it.

English (southeastern): probably a habitational name from clere, a component of several placenames in north Hampshire (Highclere, Burghclere, Kingsclere). This is probably from a Celtic stream name meaning ‘bright’ (cognate with Latin clarus ‘clear, bright’).
Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Klar   1.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Clere was born in 1147, in Rougham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Clere, was 27 and his mother, Amy Amberfeld, was 27. He married Julian Mollenes about 1167, in Rougham, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in Caistor Saint Edmunds, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

ko.Ormsby, Caistor Saint Edmunds, Norfolk,: 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 케이스터 세인트 에드먼드즈
ko.lifeSummary: William Clere(이)가 1147년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 루그함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Clere(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Amy Amberfeld(은)는 27세였다. 그는 대략 1167년 영국 노르폴크 루그함에서 Julian Mollenes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 케이스터 세인트 에드먼드즈에서 사망했다.
